testcase.name: test_04_register_for_tournament

failure.message: AssertionError: No player in response assert 'player' in {'seat': 6, 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 1, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 0, ...}}

testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_iteration27.py:126: in test_04_register_for_tournament assert "player" in data, "No player in response" E AssertionError: No player in response E assert 'player' in {'seat': 6, 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 1, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 0, ...}}

testcase.name: test_08_force_start_tournament

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected status 'in_progress', got None assert None == 'in_progress' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f25c084c80>('status') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f25c084c80> = {'message': 'Tournament started!', 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 2, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 9, ...}}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_iteration27.py:264: in test_08_force_start_tournament assert data.get("status") == "in_progress", f"Expected status 'in_progress', got {data.get('status')}" E AssertionError: Expected status 'in_progress', got None E assert None == 'in_progress' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f25c084c80>('status') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8f25c084c80> = {'message': 'Tournament started!', 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 2, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 9, ...}}.get
